dataset: Synthetic EPCRA Tier II XML data (greenfield_operations.xml, riverside_treatment.xml)

pi_items.source: Parsed greenfield_operations.xml: <facilityName> element matches exactly
File exists at examples/cameo_data_manager_env/data/greenfield_operations.xml (12,689 bytes), mounted read-only to C:\workspace\data\ per env.json
Parsed riverside_treatment.xml: <facilityName> element matches exactly
File exists at examples/cameo_data_manager_env/data/riverside_treatment.xml (13,434 bytes), mounted read-only to C:\workspace\data\ per env.json
File exists at examples/cameo_data_manager_env/data/compliance_order.txt (3,416 bytes), contains 7 findings matching metadata
Path matches compliance_order.txt REQUIRED EXPORT section. Directory C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\ is created by setup_task.ps1 and verified writable during live testing
greenfield_operations.xml <notes> field contains: 'Site Safety Officer: Margaret Callahan, phone 802-555-0418, available 24/7 for emergency response coordination.' Full name is Margaret Callahan.
greenfield_operations.xml <notes> field contains '802-555-0418' as the phone for Margaret Callahan
compliance_order.txt Finding G-1 specifies contact type 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator'. Verified no existing contact has this type in greenfield XML (David Whitfield is only 'Owner / Operator').
greenfield_operations.xml contains chemical 'Methanol' with <casNumber>67-56-1</casNumber>. CAS 67-56-1 is the correct CAS Registry Number for Methanol (verified via EPA hazard summary).

Compliance order provides TPQ=500 lbs for Methanol. XML shows aveAmount=8000 lbs. Since 8000 > 500, EHS must be true per the compliance order's directive. Current XML value is ehs=false, confirming correction is needed. Note: Methanol's presence on the federal 40 CFR 355 EHS list is debatable (some state lists include it, federal Appendix A may not), but the compliance order is the authoritative reference for this task.
greenfield_operations.xml <chemName>Methanol</chemName> for CAS 67-56-1
compliance_order.txt Finding G-3 specifies this exact string. greenfield_operations.xml has <fireDistrict></fireDistrict> (empty element), confirming no fire district is currently assigned.
riverside_treatment.xml contains chemical 'Hydrogen Peroxide' with <casNumber>7722-84-1</casNumber>. CAS 7722-84-1 is the correct CAS Registry Number for Hydrogen Peroxide.

compliance_order.txt Finding R-1 states current value is 4,500 lbs (matches XML aveAmount=4500) and correct value is 5,200 lbs. The amount code should change from 04 (1,000-9,999 range) — 5,200 stays in range code 04.
riverside_treatment.xml <chemName>Hydrogen Peroxide</chemName> for CAS 7722-84-1
riverside_treatment.xml contains chemical 'Sulfuric Acid' with <casNumber>7664-93-9</casNumber>. CAS 7664-93-9 is the correct CAS Registry Number for Sulfuric Acid.

compliance_order.txt Finding R-2 specifies correction from 'Outdoor Storage Pad' to 'Secondary Containment Building'. XML confirms current storage is <locationDescription>Outdoor Storage Pad</locationDescription>.
riverside_treatment.xml <chemName>Sulfuric Acid</chemName> for CAS 7664-93-9
riverside_treatment.xml contains contact <firstName>Maria</firstName><lastName>Santos</lastName> with types Fac. Emergency Coordinator and Emergency Contact
compliance_order.txt Finding R-3 specifies new phone 802-555-0347. XML confirms current phones are both 802-555-0301 (Work and 24-hour), confirming correction is needed.

compliance_order.txt Finding R-4 specifies correction from 'Station 7 - North Montpelier' to 'Station 12 - Montpelier Central'. XML confirms current value is <fireDistrict>Station 7 - North Montpelier</fireDistrict>.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires importing two EPCRA Tier II XML files into CAMEO Data Manager and addressing 7 findings from a compliance order. GREENFIELD OPERATIONS LLC (85 Industrial Park Drive, Burlington, VT 05401): (G-1) The facility Notes field contains 'Site Safety Officer: Margaret Callahan, phone 802-555-0418, available 24/7 for emergency response coordination' — the agent must add Margaret Callahan as a new contact with type 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator' and phone 802-555-0418. Currently only David Whitfield (Owner/Operator) exists as a contact. (G-2) Methanol (CAS 67-56-1) currently has EHS=false but its average daily amount is 8,000 lbs which exceeds the TPQ of 500 lbs stated in the compliance order — EHS must be set to true. Toluene (CAS 108-88-3, EHS=false, avg=12,000) has no TPQ and should remain false. Hydrochloric Acid (CAS 7647-01-0, EHS=true, avg=5,000) already has correct EHS=true. Only Methanol needs correction. (G-3) Fire district is currently empty and must be set to 'Burlington Fire Station 1 - Downtown'. RIVERSIDE WATER TREATMENT PLANT (220 River Road, Montpelier, VT 05602): (R-1) Hydrogen Peroxide (CAS 7722-84-1) average daily amount is currently 4,500 lbs (amount code 04) and must be updated to 5,200 lbs (stays in code 04 range). (R-2) Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9) storage location is currently 'Outdoor Storage Pad' and must be changed to 'Secondary Containment Building'. (R-3) Maria Santos (Fac. Emergency Coordinator, Emergency Contact) has phones currently set to 802-555-0301 and must be updated to 802-555-0347. (R-4) Fire district is currently 'Station 7 - North Montpelier' and must be changed to 'Station 12 - Montpelier Central'. The final export must be saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\regional_compliance_2025.xml and must contain both facilities.
